Class OrdersDaoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.aptcoursework.dao.OrdersDaoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
OrdersDao
public class OrdersDaoImpl extends Object implements OrdersDao
Implementation class for the OrdersDao interface.

This class provides concrete database operations for managing customer orders. It handles order placement, retrieval, status updates, and sales analytics calculations. It interacts with both the orders and order_items tables using JDBC.

The class includes operations such as:

  • Placing new orders and creating associated order items
  • Retrieving orders by user or by order ID
  • Updating order status during fulfillment
  • Fetching all orders for administrative purposes
  • Calculating sales metrics and revenue analytics

All database interactions are performed using JDBC with the DatabaseConnection utility class managing connections.

Author:
Kushal Puri, Sugam Rana Magar

  • Constructor Details

    • OrdersDaoImpl

      public OrdersDaoImpl()

  • Method Details

    • placeOrder

      public boolean placeOrder(int userId, ArrayList<Integer> laptopIds)
      Places a new order for a user with selected cart items. Calculates total amount including tax and shipping, creates order record, and inserts associated order items. Removes ordered items from cart.
      Specified by:
      placeOrder in interface OrdersDao
      Parameters:
      userId - the user placing the order
      laptopIds - list of laptop IDs selected for purchase
      Returns:
      true if order placed successfully, false otherwise

    • fetchOrdersByUser

      public ArrayList<Orders> fetchOrdersByUser(int userId)
      Retrieves all orders for a specific user, ordered by creation date (newest first).
      Specified by:
      fetchOrdersByUser in interface OrdersDao
      Parameters:
      userId - the user ID
      Returns:
      list of orders for the user, or null if error occurs

    • fetchOrderById

      public Orders fetchOrderById(int orderId, int userId)
      Retrieves a specific order by ID with security verification. Ensures the order belongs to the requesting user to prevent unauthorized access.
      Specified by:
      fetchOrderById in interface OrdersDao
      Parameters:
      orderId - the order ID
      userId - the user ID (security check)
      Returns:
      the Order object, or null if not found or access denied

    • updateOrderStatus

      public boolean updateOrderStatus(int orderId, String status)
      Updates the status of an order.
      Specified by:
      updateOrderStatus in interface OrdersDao
      Parameters:
      orderId - the order ID to update
      status - the new status value
      Returns:
      true if update successful, false otherwise

    • fetchAllOrders

      public ArrayList<Orders> fetchAllOrders()
      Retrieves all orders in the system with associated usernames (admin function). Orders are sorted by creation date (newest first).
      Specified by:
      fetchAllOrders in interface OrdersDao
      Returns:
      list of all orders, or null if error occurs

    • countAllOrders

      public int countAllOrders()
      Counts the total number of orders in the system.
      Specified by:
      countAllOrders in interface OrdersDao
      Returns:
      total order count, or 0 if error occurs

    • sumTotalAmount

      public double sumTotalAmount()
      Calculates the sum of total amount across all orders.
      Specified by:
      sumTotalAmount in interface OrdersDao
      Returns:
      total revenue from all orders, or 0 if error occurs or no orders exist

    • sumTotalAmountCurrentMonth

      public double sumTotalAmountCurrentMonth()
      Calculates the sum of total amount for orders placed in the current month.
      Specified by:
      sumTotalAmountCurrentMonth in interface OrdersDao
      Returns:
      total revenue for current month, or 0 if error occurs or no orders exist

    • sumTotalAmountLastMonth

      public double sumTotalAmountLastMonth()
      Calculates the sum of total amount for orders placed in the previous month.
      Specified by:
      sumTotalAmountLastMonth in interface OrdersDao
      Returns:
      total revenue for last month, or 0 if error occurs or no orders exist
